# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: users-service-1:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-service-2:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: least-connections
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: orders-service-1:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: orders-service-2:8080
        weight: 50

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: consistent-hashing
    hash_on: header
    hash_on_header: X-Tenant-Id
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: inventory-service-1:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: inventory-service-2:8080
        weight: 100

services:
  - name: users-service
    host: users-upstream
    port: 80
    protocol: http
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        paths:
          - /api/users
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

      - name: users-route-versioned
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        paths:
          - /v1/users
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

  - name: orders-service
    host: orders-upstream
    port: 80
    protocol: http
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        paths:
          - /api/orders
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

      - name: orders-route-versioned
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        paths:
          - /v1/orders
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

  - name: inventory-service
    host: inventory-upstream
    port: 80
    protocol: http
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    routes:
      - name: inventory-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        paths:
          - /api/inventory
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

      - name: inventory-route-versioned
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        paths:
          - /v1/inventory
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

plugins:
  - name: prometheus
    enabled: true

  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - "*"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - X-Request-Id
        - X-Tenant-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-Id
      credentials: false
      max_age: 3600

  - name: request-transformer
    enabled: true
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - X-Forwarded-By: kong-api-gateway
